---
title: "Biometry Final Project"
author:
  - name: Talula Wilmot
date: 03-08-2026
image: Thumbnail.png
description: Assessing differences in transpiration rate
categories: [R] 
draft: false
---

This is the final project that I completed for EEMB 146 Biometry, showing code outputs, and a complete write up assessing differences in transpiration rate between two major species on Tetiaroa, an atoll in the South Pacific. 

<iframe src="FinalProject_template.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
